The ledger is machine-canonical now (2-space, fixed key order, trailing newline).

THE GDOS ARCHITECTURE IS SET (dm-0031..0041): scores are proxies over the ONE EvidenceBundle; ALL calibration in ScoringProfile (novelty weights included); gates emit DesignDecision records; gdos/ is PURE (no sim/search/audit execution — scan-enforced); search-executing modules (Evaluate, EmergentFun) live at top-level src/eval/.

PROFILE VERSIONING: ScoringProfile v1 was extended in-place for novelty weights (dm-0039) because no persisted profile existed anywhere. That grace is SPENT — from now on treat the profile as a persisted format: any field addition bumps PROFILE_SCHEMA_VERSION with a ledgered migration decision (S5.8's apply() should version profileId, not the schema).
ONE-WAY DEPENDENCY (dm-0022) + math whitelist (dm-0017) still scan-enforced across src/eval/ incl. gdos/. No Math.random, no Date.now (DesignMemory dates and CDRE inputs are parameters).
THE AXIOM: never add maxJumps; never re-implement a jump counter. The REQ-012 curation proxy reads jumpPressed from tapes — it counts PRESSES in evidence, it does not model the lock.
Do NOT change FIXED_STEP_SECONDS (dm-0003); never mutate GameState in place (dm-0004). CANONICAL_PIPELINE is the only engine assembly order.
The private npm mirror npm.shootsta.com is broken; .npmrc pins registry.npmjs.org — don't remove it.
